name: Cantonese Roast Duck
recipeIngredient: 1 Duckling rubbed inside and out with 2 tablespoons salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the duck inside and out with salt, then refrigerate overnight.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients together and rub on the duck inside and out until used up.
3. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Place the duck on a rack, breast side up, in a pan with 1 inch of water.
5. Roast for 1 hour, then turn the duck over and roast for another 1 hour.
6. Turn the duck breast side up, increase the heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit, and roast for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from the pan and cool.
8. To serve, carve in the Chinese manner, bones and all. Alternatively, carve as you would poultry. If carved in the Chinese style, the duckling may be wrapped in foil after carving and frozen. Reheat in foil at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
